pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py mandate creating a repository with this key.
Task description specifies this URL. Verified the URL is accessible and is the official Maven Central repository via curl.
Task description specifies this path. Verified existence on Maven Central via curl HTTP HEAD request.
Verified via HTTP HEAD request on Maven Central. Actual artifact size is 751,914 bytes, confirming 700,000 is a valid lower bound.
Confirmed default credentials defined in environment's scripts/setup_artifactory.sh (ADMIN_USER='admin').
Confirmed default credentials defined in environment's scripts/setup_artifactory.sh (ADMIN_PASS='password').

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a live JFrog Artifactory instance using default credentials (admin / password). The agent must create a remote proxy repository named 'central-proxy-test' configured with the real Maven Central repository ('https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/'). The target artifact to be cached ('org/apache/commons/commons-collections4/4.4/commons-collections4-4.4.jar') was confirmed to exist on Maven Central. Its actual file size is 751,914 bytes, which validates the verifier's check for a minimum size of 700,000 bytes.
